title: Pink Peach Stir Fry
description: A sweet and savory stir fry with juicy peaches and a hint of pink salt. Serve as a healthy dinner option.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and bell pepper and stir-fry until they start to soften, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the diced peaches and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes, until they start to caramelize.
Add the pink salt and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the honey (if using) and stir-fry for another minute.
Add the Mexican stir fry mix and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until everything is well combined.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
Garnish with additional peaches and pink salt if desired.
